name: Account Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for the management of a collection of constituent relationships, typically focusing on constituent registration and service management.

name: Accountant
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who records, tracks, analyzes, and reports on the finances of the organization.

name: Admissions Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for the recording of a person to a school, college, university, health care facility.

name: Agent
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who acts on behalf of the organization in support of its objectives.

name: Applicant
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who initiates a formal request for something.

name: Application Evaluator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual tasked with assessing, validating, and recommending the processing and handling of applications, with an intended goal of denying or approving said application.

name: Application Processor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual tasked with processing and handling applications with an intended goal of denying or approving said application.

name: Asset Maintainer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or organization that repairs, restores, cleans, operates, or otherwise keeps an asset ready for use.

name: Asset Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or organization that governs a set of assets.

name: Asset Owner
description: Category: Constituent, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual or organization that has title to an asset.

name: Asset Request Evaluator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or organization that assesses or approves a request for an asset.

name: Asylum Seeker
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who is seeking international protection, including those with refugee status.

name: Auditor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual authorized to review and verify the accuracy of financial records and ensure compliance with applicable laws.

name: Authorized Representative
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who has the authority to establish a new agreement and ensure it complies with organizational policy.

name: Bill Sponsor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual, usually the first member of a legislative body to be listed among the numerous lawmakers, who introduces a bill for consideration.

name: Billing/Collections Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual responsible for collecting payment on bills, sometimes overdue, by informing debtors of their balance, as well as providing options by which the debtor may satisfy the debt.

name: Board of Directors
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An elected group of officials that represent the interests of an organization, led by a chairperson.

name: Border Crosser Sponsor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual or organization that makes an official request for another individual to cross a national border, usually for the purpose of but not limited to, employment, personal, or tourism.

name: Broker-Agent
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: External. An individual employed by a broker to advise on, sell, and maintain information on insurance products.

name: Broker-Dealer
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. An organization that buys and sells securities on its own agreement as a principal before selling the securities to constituents.

name: Business Architect
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual responsible for representing holistic, multidimensional business views of: capability end-to-end value delivery, information and organizational structure, and the relationship among these business views and strategies, products, policies, initiatives, and stakeholders.

name: Campaign Requester
description: Category: Constituent, Human Resource. Type: External, Internal. An individual who initiates a campaign on behalf of the organization.

name: Campaign Resource
description: Category: Human resource. Type: Internal. An individual or organization that supplies material or assistance to a campaign.

name: Campaign Supplier
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. An individual or organization that supplies material or assistance to a campaign.

name: Campaign Target
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who is the intended recipient of the message of a campaign.

name: Candidate
description: Category: Constituent, Human Resource. Type: External, Internal. An individual who has the potential to be an employee, or who applies or is nominated to be a recipient of an award or honor, a service, or an appointed role or position, or for an elected position.

name: Case Worker
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who has the responsibility to investigate, advocate for, advise, and represent the constituent who is the focus of the case.

name: Channel Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who manages the operations, including the production and supply of a channel of distribution.

name: Chief Data Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who has been appointed to strategically plan and enable the collection, storage, use, administration, validation, and protection of an organization's data in support of an organization's mission, goals, and objectives.

name: Chief Executive Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who has been appointed or elected to make decisions affecting a organization as a whole, who represents the organization internally and externally, and oversees the operation of an organization, coordinating operating, marketing, financial, cultural, and legal strategies that support the organization's mission and vision.

name: Chief Financial Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who has been appointed to plan, assess, and recommend action in support of an organization's financial status, projections, and fundamental solvency.

name: Chief Information Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who has been appointed to help the organization achieve its strategic and operational goals with information and data technology, supporting the organization's key business capabilities.

name: Chief Legislator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who has the most senior authority and responsibility for a legislative body.

name: Chief Operating Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who is part of the executive management team with the responsibility to create policy, organize, monitor, and assess the effectiveness of all activities related to the management of daily operations within the organization.

name: Chief Risk Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who defines and assesses financial, reputational, legal, market, or other kinds of risk that the organization may undertake.

name: Chief Technology Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who has been appointed to support business capabilities by providing enabling technologies.

name: Citizen
description: Category: Constituent. Type: Internal/External. An individual who the government has granted the rights and privileges of citizenship, and has acknowledged their responsibilities of citizenship of the granting government.

name: Claimant
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who files a claim or formal request for payment to cover a specified loss.

name: Claims Adjuster
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual authorized to evaluate a claim to determine whether or not the claim should be paid.

name: Claims Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who manages, defines, and assists with the resolution of claims.

name: Community Representative
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual chosen to represent the interests of constituents, such as tenants in any aspect of the contracts process.

name: Compliance Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who ensures that a company complies with its outside regulatory and legal requirements and internal policies and bylaws.

name: Constituent
description: Category: Constituent. Type: Internal. An individual or entity relative to an organization's sphere of responsibility.

name: Contract Manager
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual responsible for responsible for the management and administration of contracts.

name: Conveyor Operator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who directs the movement of a transport conveyor.

name: Coordinator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual whose primary responsibility is to assist disparate groups in collaborating in an organized way to achieve an expected objective.

name: Court Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual responsible for the effective operation of a court session, this person may administer oaths to witnesses, jurors, and grand jurors.

name: Court Recorder
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual, usually appointed as an officer, tasked with recording, transcribing, and maintaining the official verbatim record of the legal proceedings of a court.

name: Data Analyst
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who obtains and analyzes data for an organization in order to provide information and knowledge to assist with decision making.

name: Debtor
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. A person or organization that owes a sum of money to another person or organization.

name: Defendant
description: Category: Constituent. Type: Internal. An individual or organization sued or accused in a court of law.

name: Detective
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who typically works for a law enforcement agency leading the resolution of specific criminal cases pertaining to an individual or group of offenders.

name: Detention Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual empowered by a government authority who is responsible for the custody, supervision, safety, and regulation of detainees.

name: Election Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who is directly accountable to the courts system as an independent statutory office holder for the good conduct, administration, and reporting the outcome of an election.

name: Election Representative
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who is a paid or volunteer interested in the conduct and outcome of an election, as part of an organization or as an individual constituent.

name: Emergency Services Provider
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or organization that provides rapid response and support services for the preservation of life and property under extreme conditions.

name: Employee
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who performs services for the organization pursuant to an employment contract.

name: Energy Producer
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. A private or publicly owned organization having the primary objective of producing electricity via multiple means, such as by fossil fuels, photovoltaics, or wind.

name: Energy System Operator
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. A private or publicly owned energy-producing organization, whose primary objective is to manage energy-producing systems and dependencies.

name: Examiner
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for reviewing a patent application or claim of intellectual property to determine whether the intellectual property rights or patent can be granted.

name: Executive Sponsor
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who provides approval, permission, and guidance for a specified endeavor.

name: Facilitator
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who helps enable groups during the course of an event to achieve specific objectives.

name: Facility Specialist
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who identifies, oversees, and provides support for matters specific to the operation or oversight of a venue or location.

name: Federal Government Authority
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An organized, national administrative body, authorized in national constitutions and statutes, established to provide general government for a nation, generally corresponding to all areas into which a county is composed.

name: Finance Manager
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who administers a finance business unit and has a delegated authority to approve financial transactions to a specified limit.

name: Finance Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who ensures that the financial records of the organization are balanced and reported upon.

name: Financial Analyst
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who performs calculations on and evaluates the organization's monetary facts.

name: Financial Controller
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who is responsible for accounting activities and overseeing financial reporting, including balance sheets and revenue models.

name: Financial Planner
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who is a qualified investment professional who provides a service to help individuals and corporations meet their long-term financial objectives by analyzing the client’s status and setting a program to achieve that client’s goals.

name: Government Agency
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An organization of federal or municipal government, which is a permanent or semi-permanent organization in the machinery of government, that is responsible for the oversight and administration of specific functions.

name: Government Agency Head
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual assigned or appointed to oversee and guide the management of a government entity in the achievement of its mission and vision. The role can include governance of fiduciary, operational, financial, cultural, legal, and communications strategies.

name: Government Agent
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who represents an administrative department of a municipal or national government entity.

name: Government Immigration Agent
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who is responsible for the enforcement of immigration laws.

name: Government Prosecutor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. The legal party responsible for presenting the case in a criminal trial against the accused party.

name: Government Service Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who has responsibility for the operation or executive of a government service.

name: Guardian
description: Category: Constituent. Type: Internal. A court appointed or otherwise recognized as acting as the responsible party for a person.

name: Hiring Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for hiring an employee or employees to fill open positions in an organization.

name: Human Resource
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who is employed by the organization.

name: Human Resource Analyst
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who identifies and assesses the current and future needs of the organization for individuals to perform work.

name: Information Aggregator
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. An organization that aggregates information from different sources and presents it as a value-add service.

name: Infrastructure Contractor
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. An individual or organization who builds or maintains physical infrastructure.

name: Insured
description: Category: Constituent. Type: Internal. An individual or organization covered by insurance.

name: Investigator
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who gathers, collates and analyzes data and information to answer a specific intelligence requirement in a range of thematical criminal or civil cases, such as fraud, missing persons, malpractice, and regulatory compliance.

name: Investment Committee
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An organization responsible for identifying, communicating with, evaluating, and contracting with investors.

name: Investment Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for the activities related to financial planning, investing, and managing a portfolio for individuals or organizations.

name: Investor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or organization that provides capital to a business in exchange for equity or debt.

name: Issuer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or organization empowered to provide an official document, record, title or other form of official designation of right or authority.

name: Judge
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: External. An individual appointment as a public official with authorization to preside over cases in a court of law.

name: Juror
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual member of a jury, a sworn body of people, convened to render an impartial verdict, and set a penalty or judgment.

name: Land Government Agency
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An organization responsible for the inventory of land and resources in its jurisdiction, also responsible for developing land-use plans for its land units.

name: Landlord
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual or organization that owns a building or an area of land and is paid by a constituent for the use of it.

name: Landlord Representative
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: External. An individual or organization that represents the rights, commitment, contracts and interests of a property owner.

name: Landowner
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual or organization that has a registered, legal deed to a piece of land, and in some cases the rights to use and exploit the land for a defined, legal purpose.

name: Legal Counsel
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who oversees, identifies, and advises on legal issues in all departments and their interrelation.

name: Legal Representative
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual empowered with the authority recognized by law, to act for another person or organization in medical or legal matters, including but not limited to, a receiver, guardian, custodian, conservator.

name: Legislative Assistant
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who supports a legislator by monitoring pending legislation, conducting research related to the legislation, and drafting that legislation.

name: Legislator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. A member of an elected group of people who have been granted the power to make or change laws.

name: Lobbyist
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: External. An individual who is registered or certified to participate in an organized attempt to influence a legislator.

name: Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who oversees the work for an organizational unit.

name: Market Maker
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or firm who actively quotes both sides of a market in a particular security by providing bids and offers (known as asks).

name: Marketing Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual whose primary task is to manage the marketing resources of a product or business.

name: Material Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who oversees inventory and supplies, manages vendor relationships, assesses supply needs, coordinates delivery schedules, signs purchase orders, and tracks the flow of inventory through the organization's supply chain.

name: Mediator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who attempts to bring people or organizations involved in a conflict to come to an agreement.

name: Mentor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who provides ongoing assistance, training, and instruction to employees.

name: Migrant
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who is residing, temporarily or permanently, in a nation of which they do not hold citizenship.

name: Municipal Government Agency
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An organized, local administrative government body which provides a sub-set of government services for a defined area within a country.

name: Municipal Government Representative
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual elected to a municipal government governing body with authority to make decisions and recommendations on behalf of their electorate.

name: Network Designer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who designs new or upgraded network infrastructure.

name: Network Engineer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who builds, configures, or maintains network infrastructure.

name: Network Planner
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who plans new or upgraded network infrastructure.

name: Operations Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for staffing, training, monitoring existing processes, analyzing the effectiveness of current processes, and creating strategies to improve productivity and efficiency.

name: Paralegal
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual trained in subsidiary legal matters but not fully qualified as a legal counsel.

name: Parent
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who has a biologically or court appointment responsibility over a minor child's sustenance, housing, support, and overall well-being.

name: Partner
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. An individual or organization who has, or had, an agreement with the organization for the provision of goods or services.

name: Partner Relationship Manager
description: Category: Human Resource, Partner. Type: External, Internal. An individual who is responsible for coordinating, interacting with, evaluating, overseeing, and otherwise engaging with a partner on behalf of the organization.

name: Permitting Agent
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who has been employed and authorized with the handling, processing, and approval or denial of a permit.

name: Plaintiff
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who initiates a lawsuit before a court.

name: Planner
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who defines a schedule for a program or operation.

name: Police Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual empowered by a government authority to enforce the law, ensure the safety, health, and possessions of citizens, and prevent crime and civil disorder.

name: Policy Analyst
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual tasked with understanding the evidence and public policy environment and reporting on current public policies, or recommending adjustments to existing public policies.

name: Poll Clerk
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual responsible for administration and collection of votes for a specified location.

name: Prison Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who is a uniformed official responsible for the custody, supervision, safety, and regulation of prisoners.

name: Procurement Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual authorized to commit organization funds for purchase requests.

name: Procurer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who directs, mentors, evaluates, and assigns asset acquisition-related work to other individuals in the organization.

name: Product Assembler
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who fits together separate component parts to form an object.

name: Product Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who conceives, defines, determines, and oversees creation and distribution of a product or service on behalf of the organization.

name: Product Packager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who assembles a product with related components or products to create a deliverable.

name: Product Specialist
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. A Product Specialist is a person who possesses deep knowledge of a product or product line and can determine appropriateness for an individual constituent.

name: Program Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who creates, plans, oversees, and evaluates one or more projects in support of a general business goal.

name: Program Team Member
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who assists the program manager.

name: Project Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who has overall responsibility for the planning and execution of a particular project.

name: Proxy
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual or entity who has been granted the authority to act temporarily in place of another individual or entity, in matters such as applying for a government service, voting, and decision making.

name: Recruiter
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who identifies and obtains employees.

name: Registered Representative
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who is a financial professional who works with clients who are trading investments such as stocks and bonds.

name: Regulator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual or organization that supervises a particular industry, government function, or business activity that must demonstrate compliance with governing rules.

name: Regulatory Auditor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who has the responsibility to verify that a particular industry, government function, or business activity is conducting its activities in compliance with specified governing rules.

name: Request Evaluator
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who assesses the data completeness, data accuracy, justification of need, and funding authorization for a request.

name: Requester
description: Category: Constituent, Human Resource. Type: External, Internal. An individual who, on their own behalf or on behalf of others, makes a request for a good or service.

name: Research Agency
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An organization responsible for obtaining, analyzing, interpreting, and presenting data and information related to a field of inquiry.

name: Researcher
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for obtaining, analyzing, interpreting, and presenting data and information related to a field of inquiry.

name: Risk Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who assesses and mitigates danger, damage, or loss to the business.

name: Risk Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for defining and assessing financial, reputational, legal, market, or other kinds of risk that the organization may undertake.

name: Security Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for the protection and safeguarding of assets or people from loss or damage.

name: Security Service Provider
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual or organization that provides civil peace keeping and protection services.

name: Service (Product) Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual responsible for the development of one or more services or products for an organization.

name: Service Advisor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual representing an organization who interacts with constituents to handle complaints, process orders, and provide information about an organization’s products and services.

name: Service Officer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual representing an organization who is authorized to make decisions such as to resolve a complaint or approve an application.

name: Service Representative
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual chosen or appointed to act or speak for another or others in the context of a specific service.

name: Sponsoring Team Member
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who represents and works on behalf of a sponsor.

name: Stock Exchange Broker
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who executes orders in a financial market on behalf of clients.

name: Strategy Leader
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who oversees business strategy initiation, development, monitoring, and approval.

name: Student
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who attends school or a training program, with the goal of learning about and understanding a given subject.

name: Subject Matter Expert
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual whose knowledge and ability in a specific subject has been validated and recognized, usually by past performance, certification, or education.

name: Supplier
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. An individual or organization that provides goods or services to the organization.

name: Surveyor
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual responsible for the collection of data for the purpose of inspection, spatial measurement, and quantification of materials and structures to support valuation or construction planning.

name: Tax Collector
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual who is responsible for invoicing, tracking, and collecting taxes from constituent.

name: Technology Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual responsible for obtaining, developing, deploying, and operating automation.

name: Tenant
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual or organization that has an agreement-based right to occupy or use a piece of land or the property on the land.

name: Tester
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who subjects a product or service to an assessment of suitability or worth.

name: Trader
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual involved in initiating and managing financial positions by purchasing and selling financial assets and has a mandate to enter into financial agreements on behalf of the organization.

name: Trainer/Teacher
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who has the responsibility to guide or instruct others.

name: Training Program Manager
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who oversees and approves training programs.

name: Training Recipient
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who participates in a training course.

name: Training Team Member
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who provides instruction to employees.

name: Transport Agency
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. A public authority which regulates or administers transportation related matters.

name: Transport Operations Service Provider
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. An organization that operates transport services.

name: Treasurer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. A person appointed or elected to administer or manage the financial assets and liabilities of a government agency, organization, or other body.

name: Trust Bank (Custodian)
description: Category: Partner. Type: External. A Trust Bank (Custodian) is a legal entity that acts as a fiduciary, agent, or trustee on behalf of a person or business entity for the purpose of administration, management, and the eventual transfer of assets to a beneficial party.

name: Underwriter
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal/External. An individual who defines risk appetite by product, qualifies risks for acceptance or denial, and manages risks.

name: Valuer
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual whose knowledge and ability has been validated and recognized to assess, appraise, or provide an educated opinion as to the market value of an item, e.g., property or another type of asset.

name: Vote Counter
description: Category: Human Resource. Type: Internal. An individual responsible for the enumeration of voter indication of choice in an election.

name: Voter
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who gives a formal indication of choice in an election.

name: Witness
description: Category: Constituent. Type: External. An individual who observed but was not involved in the incident.
